Name: MiniAreaParam
Description: Determines the configuration for mini-areas. Never used.

Fields.Name: Area Name ID
Fields.Description: Text ID of the name assigned to this mini-area.

Fields.Name: Availability Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID associated with the availability status of this mini-area.

Fields.Name: Warning Line: Display Distance Start
Fields.Description: The distance from the area boundary to start displaying the area boundary warning line. (-1 means no warning line is displayed). In metres.

Fields.Name: Warning Line: Display Distance
Fields.Description: The distance from the area boundary to display the area boundary warning line at. (-1 means no warning line is displayed). In metres.
